candidate_definition_hints.text: ECCV2022 - Real-Time Intermediate Flow Estimation for Video Frame Interpolation

This project is the implement of [Real-Time Intermediate Flow Estimation for Video Frame Interpolation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.06294). Currently, our model can run 30+FPS for 2X 720p interpolation on a 2080Ti GPU. It supports arbitrary-timestep interpolation between a pair o…
